purpose: Shinobi is an autonomous Windows-native agent designed for Spanish-speaking YouTubers, aiding in content adaptation and research.

key_files.name: package.json
key_files.role: Defines project metadata, dependencies, and scripts.

key_files.name: README.md
key_files.role: Documentation providing an overview, setup instructions, and project structure.

key_files.name: tsconfig.json
key_files.role: TypeScript configuration file for compilation settings.

concerns: No tests have been defined in the package.json file.
The README mentions various blocks but the state for some is not detailed.
Build instructions require scripts that are not part of the repository as per the provided files.

purpose: Continuous watcher for upstream Hermes repo, notifies when new releases are available.

key_files.name: hermes_watcher.ts
key_files.role: Implements functionality for checking releases and managing state.

concerns: The state file loading logic may throw errors but returns null states on failure.
No unit tests are present within this file to verify functionality.
Default fetch function can fail silently without a clear error handling strategy.
State persistence might lead to stale data if the watcher is not restarted.
Usage of globally scoped constants might lead to potential conflicts in larger applications.

purpose: Documentation of the Shinobi ecosystem, including identity, architecture, roadmap, and current state.

key_files.name: 00_identity.md
key_files.role: Describes the identity and work principles of the team member.

key_files.name: 01_ecosystem.md
key_files.role: Explains the architecture and components of the Shinobi ecosystem.

key_files.name: 02_roadmap.md
key_files.role: Outlines the future milestones and goals for the project.

key_files.name: 03_state.md
key_files.role: Reports the current functioning state and confirmed tools of the project.

key_files.name: 04_pending.md
key_files.role: Lists technical pending tasks and issues.

concerns: No posts have been published on LinkedIn; roadmap phase 0.5 is still pending.
Cloudflare Turnstile detection is blocking Upwork; solutions are documented but outside the current scope.
L3 keyword filter has false positives; fix is required for targeting insurance brokers.
Validation of the orchestrator has not been tested in a real mission yet.
Multiple tasks and validations are pending completion, according to the latest updates.

purpose: Contains scripts for running tests, generating logs, and validating reports related to the Shinobi ecosystem.

key_files.name: a4_run.ts
key_files.role: Executes runRead on repositories and logs results

key_files.name: build_log_generate.mjs
key_files.role: Generates build log from GitHub commits

concerns: No tests for build_log_generate.mjs.
Error handling in scripts could be improved.
Temporary directories created in tests are cleaned up, but could leave traces if errors occur.
Scripts might not handle all edge cases during execution.
No version control on dependencies within scripts.

purpose: Contains a list of YouTube video URLs related to AI agents and automation.
This folder contains demonstration scripts, skills for desktop automation, and mission metadata for the Shinobi project.

key_files.name: demos/full-self-improve-2026-05-04T09-23-04-525Z.transcript.txt
key_files.role: Demo transcript for full self-improvement mode execution.

key_files.name: skills/desktop/README.md
key_files.role: Documentation for Shinobi desktop skills and installation instructions.

key_files.name: skills/desktop/desktop-premiere-basic-cut/SKILL.md
key_files.role: Specification for the Premiere Pro automation skill.

key_files.name: missions/2026-05-05T21-53-46-420Z_self/meta.json
key_files.role: Metadata for a mission task execution.

concerns: The desktop skills cannot be E2E tested in CI due to Premiere licensing requirements.
There are TODOs in docs/manual_actions.md for verifying some skills in a fully configured environment.
